identity_baseline: Massive, eight-legged alien beasts used as mounts.
physical_build: Large-scale octopedal frame; massive body mass.
stable_visual_summary: Large, massive octopedal beasts characterized by a slate-colored, hairless skin. These eight-legged animals serve as alien mounts and possess a heavy, substantial physical presence.
state_variants: Mounted (ridden by Martian Warriors or The Leader)
continuity_constraints: Must maintain eight legs (octopedal) in all shots.
Skin must remain slate-colored and hairless.
unresolved_ambiguities: Exact scale relative to human characters.
